label: About
title: About Red Fold Prototype
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 81 recent saved-signal files and 79 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Ryan Stephen and @tomosman: This "loop" automation is nuts inside of Codex. "/goal go over every single feature..., plus 7 more. A source image from framerusercontent.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Red Fold Prototype: A diagrammatic fold seen as a side-lit object slab: one saturated red architectural plane fills the frame like a shallow public threshold, interrupted by a tall black-glass spine and a wide translucent acoustic bar crossing it. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against central black glass spine, wide translucent horizontal acoustic bar, and round polished glass apertures.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
